Organisasjon - Midt-Troms Museum

https://mtmu.no/organisasjon/
Avvik: 83 | Bestått: 241
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" class="attachment-full size-full wp-image-13719 lazyload" data-src="https://mtmu.no/wp-content/uploads/2021/08/MTMLogo-m-samisk-hvit.svg" height="43" src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" class="attachment-full size-full wp-image-13719 lazyload" data-src="https://mtmu.no/wp-content/uploads/2021/08/MTMLogo-m-samisk-hvit.svg" height="43" src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="" viewbox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M19 6.41l-1.41-1.41-5.59 5.59-5.59-5.59-1.41 1.41 5.59 5.59-5.59 5.59 1.41 1.41 5.59-5.59 5.59 5.59 1.41-1.41-5.59-5.59z"></path><path d="M0 0h24v24h-24z" fi
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (8 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-small">Organisasjon</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h5

<h5 aria-level="5" id="wt-cli-cookie-banner-title" role="heading" style="display:block; box-sizing:border-box; width:100%; padding:5px 0px; color:rgb(255, 255, 255); background:none rgba(0, 0, 0, 0);
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h5

MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (9 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h4, should start with h1

<h4 style="">Midt-Troms Museum forvalter museer og kulturminner i et stort geografisk område. Noen kan besøkes året rundt, andre er åpne sommerstid eller ved arrangementer. Anlegg og utstillinger fort
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Utforsk</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h5

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (9 avvik)

First heading is h4, should start with h1

<h4 style="">Midt-Troms Museum forvalter museer og kulturminner i et stort geografisk område. Noen kan besøkes året rundt, andre er åpne sommerstid eller ved arrangementer. Anlegg og utstillinger fort
Start your heading structure with h1

Personvernerklæring - Midt-Troms Museum

https://mtmu.no/personvernerklearing/
Avvik: 93 | Bestått: 222
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" class="attachment-full size-full wp-image-13719 lazyload" data-src="https://mtmu.no/wp-content/uploads/2021/08/MTMLogo-m-samisk-hvit.svg" height="43" src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" class="attachment-full size-full wp-image-13719 lazyload" data-src="https://mtmu.no/wp-content/uploads/2021/08/MTMLogo-m-samisk-hvit.svg" height="43" src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="" viewbox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M19 6.41l-1.41-1.41-5.59 5.59-5.59-5.59-1.41 1.41 5.59 5.59-5.59 5.59 1.41 1.41 5.59-5.59 5.59 5.59 1.41-1.41-5.59-5.59z"></path><path d="M0 0h24v24h-24z" fi
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (8 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Utforsk</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4

MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h5

<h5 aria-level="5" id="wt-cli-cookie-banner-title" role="heading" style="display:block; box-sizing:border-box; width:100%; padding:5px 0px; color:rgb(255, 255, 255); background:none rgba(0, 0, 0, 0);

Besøk oss - Midt-Troms Museum

https://mtmu.no/besok-oss/
Avvik: 191 | Bestått: 293
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (3 avvik)

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h6

Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h6

Ansatte - Midt-Troms Museum

https://mtmu.no/ansatte/
Avvik: 83 | Bestått: 279
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" class="attachment-full size-full wp-image-13719 lazyload" data-src="https://mtmu.no/wp-content/uploads/2021/08/MTMLogo-m-samisk-hvit.svg" height="43" src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" class="attachment-full size-full wp-image-13719 lazyload" data-src="https://mtmu.no/wp-content/uploads/2021/08/MTMLogo-m-samisk-hvit.svg" height="43" src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="" viewbox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M19 6.41l-1.41-1.41-5.59 5.59-5.59-5.59-1.41 1.41 5.59 5.59-5.59 5.59 1.41 1.41 5.59-5.59 5.59 5.59 1.41-1.41-5.59-5.59z"></path><path d="M0 0h24v24h-24z" fi
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (8 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Utforsk</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h5

<h5 aria-level="5" id="wt-cli-cookie-banner-title" role="heading" style="display:block; box-sizing:border-box; width:100%; padding:5px 0px; color:rgb(255, 255, 255); background:none rgba(0, 0, 0, 0);
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h5

MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content

https://mtmu.no/digitalt-museum/
Avvik: 85 | Bestått: 197
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (3 avvik)

2.4.2 Sidetittel (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.2 (2.4.2 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading

Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (8 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h4, should start with h1

<h4 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Utforsk</h4>
Start your heading structure with h1

Personvernerklæring - Midt-Troms Museum

https://mtmu.no/personvernerklearing/
Avvik: 93 | Bestått: 222
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" class="attachment-full size-full wp-image-13719 lazyload" data-src="https://mtmu.no/wp-content/uploads/2021/08/MTMLogo-m-samisk-hvit.svg" height="43" src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" class="attachment-full size-full wp-image-13719 lazyload" data-src="https://mtmu.no/wp-content/uploads/2021/08/MTMLogo-m-samisk-hvit.svg" height="43" src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="" viewbox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M19 6.41l-1.41-1.41-5.59 5.59-5.59-5.59-1.41 1.41 5.59 5.59-5.59 5.59 1.41 1.41 5.59-5.59 5.59 5.59 1.41-1.41-5.59-5.59z"></path><path d="M0 0h24v24h-24z" fi
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (8 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Utforsk</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h5

<h5 aria-level="5" id="wt-cli-cookie-banner-title" role="heading" style="display:block; box-sizing:border-box; width:100%; padding:5px 0px; color:rgb(255, 255, 255); background:none rgba(0, 0, 0, 0);
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Duplicate ID found: '783' appears 4 times

id="783"

Testreglene er basert på UU-tilsynets offisielle testregler

🔄 Start ny skanning

https://www.mtmu.no
1-500

Kopier kommandoen:

python checker.py https://www.mtmu.no --max-pages 20 --format html
